mapper.select: SELECT cm.id, cm.session_id, cm.sender_id, cm.receiver_id, cm.content, cm.content_type, cm.send_time, cm.is_read, sender.name AS sender_name, receiver.name AS receiver_name FROM chat_message cm LEFT JOIN user sender ON cm.sender_id = sender.id LEFT JOIN user receiver ON cm.receiver_id = receiver.id WHERE cm.session_id = #{sessionId} ORDER BY cm.send_time ASC

SELECT cm.session_id, CASE WHEN cm.sender_id = #{adminUserId} THEN cm.receiver_id ELSE cm.sender_id END AS user_id, CASE WHEN cm.sender_id = #{adminUserId} THEN receiver.name ELSE sender.name END AS user_name, SUM(CASE WHEN cm.is_read = 0 AND cm.receiver_id = #{adminUserId} THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS unread_count, cm.content AS last_message, cm.send_time AS last_message_time FROM chat_message cm LEFT JOIN user sender ON cm.sender_id = sender.id LEFT JOIN user receiver ON cm.receiver_id = receiver.id WHERE (cm.sender_id = #{adminUserId} OR cm.receiver_id = #{adminUserId}) AND cm.send_time = ( SELECT MAX(send_time) FROM chat_message cm2 WHERE cm2.session_id = cm.session_id ) GROUP BY cm.session_id ORDER BY cm.send_time DESC

SELECT cm.id, cm.session_id, cm.sender_id, cm.receiver_id, cm.content, cm.content_type, cm.send_time, cm.is_read, sender.name AS sender_name, receiver.name AS receiver_name FROM chat_message cm LEFT JOIN user sender ON cm.sender_id = sender.id LEFT JOIN user receiver ON cm.receiver_id = receiver.id
AND cm.session_id = #{sessionId}
AND MATCH(cm.content) AGAINST(#{keyword} IN NATURAL LANGUAGE MODE)
ORDER BY cm.send_time DESC
